q: What is the most difficult subject for you to learn?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về thử thách cá nhân. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Chọn một môn bạn thấy khó (Toán, Lý, Văn, ngoại ngữ khác). Giải thích tại sao (nhiều công thức, quá trừu tượng, khó nhớ từ vựng). Bạn có thể nói thêm về cách bạn vượt qua nó. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'find it quite challenging', 'struggle with', 'abstract concepts', 'memorize formulas', 'overcome the difficulty', 'persistently'.

band7.text: For me, Physics is the most difficult subject. I find it very hard to memorize all the formulas and understand how they apply to real life. I usually have to spend more time on it than on other subjects to get a good grade.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, nêu lý do cụ thể (công thức, ứng dụng). Sử dụng từ vựng ổn ('memorize', 'formulas').

band8.text: I've always struggled with Mathematics. I find the abstract concepts and complex logic quite challenging to grasp. However, I've been trying to overcome this difficulty by practicing regularly and asking my teachers for extra help.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tốt ('struggled with', 'abstract concepts', 'challenging to grasp', 'overcome the difficulty'). Cách diễn đạt cầu tiến.

band9.text: Undoubtedly, philosophy has been the most demanding subject for me. I often find the highly abstract theories and dense academic texts to be quite overwhelming. Despite the initial struggle, I persistently engage with the materials to broaden my intellectual horizons.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ C1/C2 ('undoubtedly', 'demanding', 'abstract theories', 'dense academic texts', 'persistently', 'intellectual horizons'). Diễn đạt cực kỳ học thuật.

v.meaning: vật lộn với/gặp khó khăn với
v.example: Many students struggle with chemistry because of its complex formulas.
Mathematics often involves high-level abstract concepts.
The theory of relativity is incredibly challenging to grasp for beginners.
He worked hard to overcome his difficulty with reading and writing.
She persistently practiced until she could play the piano piece perfectly.
Medicine is widely known as a very demanding subject of study.

v.meaning: văn bản học thuật dày đặc/khó hiểu
v.example: The students spent hours trying to understand the dense academic texts in the library.
Studying history abroad really helped broaden my intellectual horizons.
I find it very boring to simply memorize formulas without understanding the logic behind them.
The amount of work I have to do this week is absolutely overwhelming.
It took me a long time to grasp the main idea of the lecture.
Learning a new language requires a great deal of patience and perseverance.
His dedication to his research is truly inspiring for everyone in the department.
Doing the same repetitive tasks every day can be very tiresome.

v.meaning: đòi hỏi nhiều nỗ lực/mệt mỏi
v.example: The exam period is a very taxing time for both students and teachers.
The prospect of speaking in front of a thousand people was quite daunting.
The problem is more complex than it first appears.
The clock has an extremely intricate mechanism with hundreds of tiny parts.
The course is very theoretical and lacks practical application.

v.meaning: sự khắt khe trong học thuật
v.example: The PhD program is known for its intense academic rigor.

v.meaning: sự bế tắc/ngăn chặn về tinh thần
v.example: I had a total mental block during the math exam and couldn't remember anything.
There was a lot of confusion about the new rules.
It's very frustrating when you study hard but still don't get a good grade.
The laws of quantum physics are often described as counterintuitive.
The answer to the problem remained elusive despite hours of work.
Poverty is a multifaceted problem that requires a complex solution.
Passing the entrance exam is the first major academic hurdle for students.
Science subjects help develop strong analytical thinking skills.
Mathematics is based on precise logical reasoning.
The course requires students to perform a critical analysis of historical events.
Learning from your own mistakes through self-correction is very effective.
I've started my revision early to avoid cramming before the exam.
The school is trying to move away from rote learning and towards interactive methods.
I can't comprehend how someone could be so cruel to animals.
Achieving mastery in a musical instrument takes years of practice.
You need to demonstrate a high level of proficiency in English to apply for the course.
The training program aims to improve the professional competence of the staff.
I'm looking for some guidance on which career path to choose.
He hired a private tutor to help him with his A-level maths.
I have very little time for extracurricular activities because of my heavy workload.
The university provides a very stimulating academic environment for research.

v.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ
v.example: Reading widely is a great way to satisfy your intellectual curiosity.
Her success is a testament to her hard work and perseverance.
He showed great tenacity in pursuing his goals despite many setbacks.
Children often show a remarkable amount of resilience after a traumatic event.
Success in life requires a combination of passion and grit.
She has a lot of determination and never gives up easily.
What was your main motivation for wanting to become a doctor?
The company has a strong commitment to environmental sustainability.
The school strives for excellence in both academics and sports.
